statement: In every magma, Equation 2607 (`x = (y * ((z * z) * y)) * z`) implies Equation 4557 (`x * (y * z) = (w * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0895
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z z) y)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op (op w x) x)
